consumes.role: upstream attended DevHub read-only runbook packet

authorization_prerequisites.title: Reviewer confirms every proposed live-readiness claim is source cited
authorization_prerequisites.reviewer_action: Confirm that all gate, recrawl, and read-only DevHub prerequisites cite official public anchors or committed upstream packet evidence before authorization.

authorization_prerequisites.title: Reviewer confirms fixture gaps are closed before live work
authorization_prerequisites.reviewer_action: Confirm that committed fixtures cover the gate review, public recrawl, and attended read-only runbook prerequisites without requiring live crawl output.

authorization_prerequisites.title: Reviewer confirms live-boundary decisions are explicit
authorization_prerequisites.reviewer_action: Confirm that public recrawl, DevHub read-only attendance, authentication state, browser artifacts, and official actions remain blocked unless a later packet authorizes a narrower live operation.

authorization_prerequisites.title: Reviewer confirms required operator signoff fields are blank and complete
authorization_prerequisites.reviewer_action: Confirm that operator identity, authorization timestamp, scope confirmation, boundary confirmation, and attestation confirmation are required and intentionally blank in the fixture.

fixture_gap_closures.gap: Live-readiness gate packet must be consumed without relying on live state.
fixture_gap_closures.closure_summary: Authorization prerequisites cite gate-review evidence and keep live activity blocked pending reviewer signoff.

fixture_gap_closures.gap: Public recrawl operator packet must not trigger a live crawl during readiness review.
fixture_gap_closures.closure_summary: Live-boundary decisions allow only fixture review and prohibit network recrawl until separately authorized.

fixture_gap_closures.gap: Attended DevHub read-only packet must not create auth state, browser artifacts, or account-scoped captures.
fixture_gap_closures.closure_summary: Required attestations prohibit live DevHub access, auth-state storage, browser artifacts, and official actions in this packet.

operator_signoff_fields.label: Operator name
operator_signoff_fields.confirmation_text: I am the operator requesting reviewer authorization for the bounded readiness packet.

operator_signoff_fields.label: Authorization timestamp UTC
operator_signoff_fields.confirmation_text: I confirm the exact UTC time at which reviewer authorization is granted.

operator_signoff_fields.label: Authorized scope
operator_signoff_fields.confirmation_text: I confirm the authorized scope remains limited to fixture review and offline validation unless a later packet narrows and authorizes live work.

operator_signoff_fields.label: Boundary acknowledgement
operator_signoff_fields.confirmation_text: I acknowledge that this packet does not authorize live crawling, live DevHub access, auth-state creation, browser artifacts, or official actions.

operator_signoff_fields.label: Attestation acknowledgement
operator_signoff_fields.confirmation_text: I confirm the no-live-crawl, no-live-DevHub, no-auth-state, no-browser-artifact, and no-official-action attestations remain true for this packet.

attestations.statement: This packet does not authorize or perform live public crawling, recrawling, robots fetching, or processor archival runs.
This packet does not authorize or perform live DevHub access, login, attended browser operation, or account-scoped reading.
This packet does not create, read, persist, or commit cookies, storage state, credentials, MFA artifacts, or private session files.
This packet does not create, store, or commit screenshots, traces, HAR files, browser profiles, downloads, or raw crawl output.
This packet does not submit, certify, upload, pay, schedule, cancel, create accounts, change account settings, or otherwise take official action.
